prestazioni: Engine: L539 6.5L V12 (naturally aspirated, dry-sump) – Full titanium connecting rods (Pankl Racing Systems) with upgraded 12.5:1 forged pistons (JE Pistons) to handle 900+ HP on VP Racing C16 fuel, paired with a custom billet crankshaft (Callies Compstar) for 9,000 RPM reliability in endurance racing conditions.

Forced Induction: Single Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (86mm compressor wheel, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 4.5" titanium downpipe (Akrapovič) and dual 44mm wastegates (Tial MV-R) to eliminate boost creep, feeding into a custom air-to-water intercooler (PWR) with a 10L ice reservoir for track sessions.

Drivetrain: 6-speed sequential transmission (Xtrac P1046) with a carbon-fiber driveshaft (GKN Driveline) and a limited-slip differential (Wavetrac Type-1) with 75% lockup under load, paired with a Sachs Racing dual-disc clutch (240mm) and a lightweight flywheel (Tilton) for rapid gear shifts in FIA GT3 spec.

Suspension: Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers (4-way adjustable) with custom valving for the R-GT’s 2,665mm wheelbase, paired with spherical bearing control arms (Tractive Suspension) and a front sway bar (Eibach 28mm adjustable) to reduce understeer in high-speed corners.

Braking: AP Racing CP9430 calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 400mm carbon-ceramic rotors (Brembo CCMR) and Ferodo DS3000 pads, paired with a custom brake bias adjuster (BalancePro) for fine-tuning under varying fuel loads and tire wear.

ECU & Electronics: Motec M150 ECU with a custom CAN bus integration for the R-GT’s OEM traction control (Lamborghini Corsa Mode) and a Pectel PDM32 power distribution module, paired with a Bosch Motorsport MS5.1 ABS system and a custom launch control strategy (3,500 RPM flat-shift).
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon-fiber widebody kit (Prior Design PD-LP600 GT3) with a 2,100mm rear wing (AeroTech Designs, 3-element, adjustable angle of attack) and a custom front splitter (3D-printed carbon, 150mm overhang) with integrated dive planes for 1,200kg of downforce at 250 km/h.

Exterior: Custom livery (FIA GT3-spec, vinyl-wrapped by Avery Dennison) with a matte black base (3M 2080) and neon green accents (Hexis HX20000), paired with OEM R-GT carbon-fiber side skirts (Lamborghini Squadra Corse) and a custom rear diffuser (Rocket Bunny, 5-element) for improved airflow extraction.

Wheels & Tires: OZ Racing Superforgiata GT3 wheels (18x12 front, 18x13 rear, 5x130 PCD) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/645R18 front, 325/705R18 rear) and custom center-lock adapters (BBS Motorsport) for rapid pit stops, paired with TPMS sensors (Schrader 433MHz) for real-time pressure monitoring.

Interior: Full FIA-spec roll cage (Sparco Pro2000, 8-point) with carbon-fiber door cards (VIS Racing) and a custom Alcantara-wrapped steering wheel (MOMO Mod.77 GT3) featuring a Motec C127 dash display and paddle shifters (Sparco Pro Shift) for sequential gear changes. Seats: Recaro SPG XL (carbon-Kevlar, FIA 8862-2009 certified).

Lighting: Full LED conversion (LuxVision) with custom Hella 500 FF fog lights (integrated into the front splitter) and a rear light bar (Osram LEDriving GT) for improved visibility in endurance racing conditions, paired with a custom DRL system (Philips Ultinon Pro9000).
